title: Data Science Core Principles Part 1A Project
tagline: Build a mini application using Data Science Core Principles Part 1A
description: Create a working Data Science application demonstrating Data Science Core Principles Part 1A.
starterCode:
# Python implementation for Data Science Core Principles Part 1A
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solution:
# Python implementation for Data Science Core Principles Part 1A
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solutionExpl: This solution demonstrates clean application of Data Science Core Principles Part 1A in Data Science.
